title: IT Support Technician
description:
Provide Tier 1 and Tier 2 desktop support for Windows 10 and Windows 11 users.
Manage Active Directory users, groups and organizational units.
Administer Windows Server 2022.
Support DNS, DHCP, TCP/IP, LAN/WAN and VPN connectivity.
Troubleshoot Microsoft 365 issues.
Create PowerShell scripts for administration.
Support VMware virtual machines.
Use Git and VS Code for documentation and scripting.

title: Desktop Support Technician
description:
Install Windows 10 and Windows 11 workstations.
Provide Active Directory account support.
Troubleshoot Microsoft 365 applications.
Resolve DNS, DHCP and TCP/IP issues.
Support VPN users.
Deploy Windows Server 2022 updates.
Maintain VMware virtual machines.
Automate repetitive tasks using PowerShell.

title: Help Desk Analyst
description:
Provide remote Help Desk support.
Support Windows 10 and Windows 11.
Reset passwords in Active Directory.
Support Microsoft 365 users.
Troubleshoot VPN connectivity.
Resolve DNS and DHCP issues.
Document incidents using GitHub.
Use PowerShell for basic automation.
